steps.title: Use square area
steps.content: The area of a square is side length times side length. The problem asks for area, not perimeter, so the expression needs two factors of the side length.

steps.title: Substitute the side length
steps.content:
With side length $86$ centimeters, substitute $86$ for each side length in the area expression:
$$86\cdot86$$
This represents square centimeters because it multiplies centimeters by centimeters. The answer is D.
